refactorings_applied: console.warn message format consistency: unified fetchLmStudioModels() warning messages to include ', skipping model fetch' suffix, matching fetchOllamaModels() pattern

review_point_1_error_handling_consistenc.detail: fetchLmStudioModels() had 5 console.warn messages without ', skipping model fetch' suffix while fetchOllamaModels() included it in all messages. Unified to consistent format.

review_point_2_lm_studio_model_pattern.detail: LM_STUDIO_MODEL_PATTERN correctly includes @ character for HuggingFace revision format, 200-character limit per design policy S4-002. JSDoc documents character set rationale, actual model ID examples, and length limit rationale.

review_point_3_dynamic_provider_readabil.detail: ensureOpencodeConfig() dynamic provider configuration code is clean and readable. Inline if-branches for 2 providers follow KISS principle (D1-002). JSDoc contains refactoring guidance for 3rd provider addition.

review_point_4_mockfetch_url_branching.detail: setupMockFetch helper correctly branches on URL (OLLAMA_API_URL vs LM_STUDIO_API_URL). Undefined provider options correctly default to ECONNREFUSED rejection. Unknown URLs are rejected with descriptive error.

review_point_5_jsdoc_appropriateness.detail: All exported functions/types have proper JSDoc with @internal annotations. Security references (SEC-001, D4-003, D4-004, D4-005, D4-007, SEC-005) are properly cited. ProviderModels type documents minimal design rationale per S1-006.

review_point_6_todo_comments.detail: TODO comments for 3rd provider extraction present at: (1) fetchOllamaModels() line 217-218, (2) fetchLmStudioModels() line 284-285, (3) ensureOpencodeConfig() JSDoc lines 341-342. All reference fetchWithTimeout(url, timeoutMs, maxResponseSize) as the planned extraction target.

additional_observations: Error isolation design is correct: each fetch function catches all exceptions internally, making Promise.all safe without external try-catch

Security measures are comprehensive: SSRF prevention (hardcoded URLs), DoS prevention (response size limits, model count limits, timeout), path traversal prevention (3-layer validation), JSON injection prevention (JSON.stringify)
Test coverage is thorough: 48 tests covering constants, pattern validation, both fetch functions (normal + 6 error paths each), and integration tests with URL-branching mock
No code smells detected: no long methods (all under 50 lines), no magic numbers, appropriate naming
commits: 9a9df24: refactor(opencode-config): unify console.warn message format for consistency
message: Refactoring review completed. One minor inconsistency fixed: unified console.warn message format in fetchLmStudioModels() to match fetchOllamaModels() pattern. All 6 review points verified. 48 tests pass, 100% line coverage maintained, 0 TypeScript errors, 0 ESLint errors.
